compiled_state.title: test-record-test-status-centrality.sh: test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash fails intermittently -> old cache directory not absent after hash change
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash in tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh fails intermittently. The assertion 'old cache directory absent after hash change' expects 'yes' but gets 'no'. Observed during a9f2-d555 fix verification: 1 of 3 consecutive runs failed. The test passes on rerun, suggesting a timing/cleanup race in centrality cache directory management.
